name: Pork & Corn Stuffing Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's Golden Corn Soup (10 3/4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
Prep Time: 10 minutes. Cook Time: 30 minutes
1. Combine soup, stuffing, celery, onion, and paprika.
2. Spoon the stuffing mixture into a greased 9-inch pie plate. Arrange the pork chops on top of the stuffing, pressing lightly into it.
3. In a small bowl, combine sugar and mustard. Spread this mixture evenly over the pork chops.
4. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes or until the pork chops are no longer pink. Garnish with celery leaves if desired.
Serves 4
